zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Bowes於大約1550年出生在英國達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓時，她的父親Sir George Bowes24歲，母親Dorothy Mallory28歲。她於1575年與Sir John Conyers在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1598年2月12日在英國達勒姆索可本享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭達勒姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Bowes于大约1550年出生在英国達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓时，她的父亲Sir George Bowes24岁，母亲Dorothy Mallory28岁。她于1575年与Sir John Conyers在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1598年2月12日在英国達勒姆索可本享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰達勒姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bowes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Bowes (formerly in North Yorkshire, now in County Durham), or from some other place so called, the placename being derived from the plural of Old English boga ‘bow’, here referring to bends in a river. Alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) arches or bridge’. See Bow 1.
English: variant of Bow , with excrescent -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

variants.name: Bow
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English boga ‘bow, arch, vault’, i.e. an arched bridge. There are places so called in Midlothian, Middlesex, and Devon.
Irish and English: variant of   Bowes  .

Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese names 寶 (meaning ‘treasure’) or 保 (meaning ‘protect’), which were monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Bowes was born about 1550, in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, her father, Sir George Bowes, was 24 and her mother, Dorothy Mallory, was 28. She married Sir John Conyers in 1575, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 12 February 1598, in Sockburn, Durham, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Durham, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Bowes est née environ 1550, à Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Bowes, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Mallory, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Conyers en 1575, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 février 1598, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Bowes um 1550 in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Bowes 24 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Mallory 28. Sie hat 1575 in Yorkshire, England Sir John Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Februar 1598 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Sockburn, Durham, England und wurde in Durham, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Bowes è nata il circa 1550 nel Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, sua padre, Sir George Bowes, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Mallory, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Conyers nel 1575, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 12 febbraio 1598, nel Sockburn, Durham, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Bowesが約1550年にイギリスダルハムストレアトラム アンド スティイントンで生まれた時，父Sir George Bowesは24歳，母Dorothy Malloryは28歳であった。1575年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir John Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1598年2月12日にイギリスダルハムソクブルンで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスダルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Bowes(이)가 대략 1550년 영국 뒤람 스트리틀램 앤드 스테인턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Bowes(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Mallory(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1575년 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir John Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1598년 2월 12일 영국 뒤람 속번에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Bowes nasceu aproximadamente 1550, em Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir George Bowes, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Mallory, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Conyers em 1575, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1598, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Bowes родилась около 1550 г. в местности стритлэм анд стеинтон, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir George Bowes было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Mallory, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Conyers в 1575 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 12 февраля 1598 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Bowes nació aproximadamente 1550, en Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir George Bowes, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Dorothy Mallory, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir John Conyers en 1575, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1598, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
